executives.name: Gerard Bond
executives.background: Mr. Bond was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer of OceanaGold in April 2022. He has over 25 years of experience in the global financial and resources industry, including 10 years at Newcrest Mining Limited as Finance Director and Chief Financial Officer. Prior to Newcrest, he held senior executive roles at BHP Billiton.

tenure_dates.title: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Marius Niekerk
executives.background: Mr. van Niekerk was appointed Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer in February 2023. He has more than 25 years of experience in the mining and metals industry, having held senior financial leadership roles at Newmont Corporation and BHP Billiton.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
Chief Financial Officer & Executive Vice President

executives.name: Peter Steenkamp
executives.background: Mr. Steenkamp was appointed Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer in October 2023. He has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior roles at Harmony Gold Mining Company and African Rainbow Minerals.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Liang Tang
executives.background: Ms. Tang is the Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Company Secretary. She joined OceanaGold in 2009 and has over 20 years of experience in legal and corporate governance within the mining industry.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Company Secretary

executives.name: Alan Pangbourne
executives.background: Mr. Pangbourne has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior executive roles at Guyanese Gold Corp and Kinross Gold Corporation.

executives.name: Catherine Gignac
executives.background: Catherine Gignac is a corporate director with more than 30 years of experience in capital markets and the mining industry as a mining equity research analyst and geologist.

executives.name: Diane Garrett
executives.background: Dr. Garrett has more than 25 years of experience in the mining industry. She is currently the President and CEO of Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation.

executives.name: Ian Gendall
executives.background: Mr. Gendall is a geologist with over 30 years of experience in the mineral exploration industry. He has held senior positions with several exploration companies and has been involved in the discovery and development of several mineral deposits in South America and Canada.

executives.name: Ian Reid
executives.background: Mr. Reid is a former senior executive at Caterpillar Inc. with extensive experience in global mining equipment and technology.

executives.name: Jake Klein
executives.background: Mr. Klein was the founding Executive Chairman of Evolution Mining. He has over 25 years’ experience in the mining industry. He was previously President and CEO of Sino Gold Mining Limited.

executives.name: Linda Broughton
executives.background: Ms. Broughton is a senior environmental and mining professional with over 30 years of experience in risk management and sustainability.

executives.name: Marius van Niekerk
executives.background: Mr. van Niekerk joined OceanaGold in 2023. He has more than 25 years of experience in the mining and resources industry, having held senior financial and commercial roles at Newcrest Mining and BHP.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Michelle Du Plessis
executives.background: Ms. Du Plessis joined OceanaGold in 2022. She has over 20 years of experience in human resources and organizational development within the mining and resources sector.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief People and Technology Officer

executives.name: Mick McMullen
executives.background: Mr. McMullen is a mining professional with over 25 years of experience. He was previously the CEO and President of Detour Gold Corporation and CEO of Stillwater Mining Company.

executives.name: Paul Benson
executives.background: Mr. Benson was appointed as Chairman in 2021. He has over 30 years of experience in the mining sector, including as CEO of SSR Mining and CEO of Troy Resources.

executives.name: Peter Sharpe
executives.background: Mr. Sharpe joined OceanaGold in 2022. He is a mining executive with over 25 years of experience in the resources industry, including senior leadership roles at Newcrest Mining and BHP.

executives.name: Sandra Dodds
executives.background: Ms. Dodds has over 25 years of experience in operational and financial roles across various industries including infrastructure and mining services.

executives.name: Tim Gitzel
executives.background: Tim Gitzel is President and Chief Executive Officer of Cameco. He has more than 30 years of experience in the Canadian and international uranium mining industry. He joined Cameco in 2007 as Senior Vice-President and Chief Operating Officer and was appointed President in 2010 and CEO in 2011. Prior to joining Cameco, he was Executive Vice-President, mining business unit for AREVA in Paris, France.

board_of_directors.name: Paul Benson
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Benson was appointed as Chairman of the Board in October 2021. He has over 30 years of experience in the mining sector, including serving as CEO and Managing Director of SSR Mining Inc. and CEO of Troy Resources.

board_of_directors.name: Gerard Bond
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Bond is the President and CEO of OceanaGold. See executive profile for further details.

tenure_dates.title: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer

board_of_directors.name: Ian Reid
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Reid is an experienced director and former senior executive with over 30 years in the resources and chemicals industries, including a long career with Orica Limited.

board_of_directors.name: Catherine Gignac
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Gignac has over 30 years of experience in capital markets and the mining industry. She has served as a mining equity research analyst and held various director roles in mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Mick McMullen
board_of_directors.background: Mr. McMullen is a mining professional with over 25 years of experience. He was previously the CEO and President of Detour Gold Corporation and CEO of Stillwater Mining Company.

board_of_directors.name: Sandra Dodds
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Dodds has over 25 years of experience in operational and financial roles across various industries including infrastructure and mining services.

board_of_directors.name: Alan Pangbourne
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Pangbourne has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior executive roles at Guyanese Gold Corp and Kinross Gold Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Diane Garrett
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Garrett has more than 25 years of experience in the mining industry. She is currently the President and CEO of Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Jake Klein
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Klein was the founding Executive Chairman of Evolution Mining. He has over 25 years’ experience in the mining industry. He was previously President and CEO of Sino Gold Mining Limited.

board_of_directors.name: Linda Broughton
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Broughton is a senior environmental and mining professional with over 30 years of experience in risk management and sustainability.

board_of_directors.name: Tim Gitzel
board_of_directors.background: Tim Gitzel is President and Chief Executive Officer of Cameco. He has more than 30 years of experience in the Canadian and international uranium mining industry. He joined Cameco in 2007 as Senior Vice-President and Chief Operating Officer and was appointed President in 2010 and CEO in 2011. Prior to joining Cameco, he was Executive Vice-President, mining business unit for AREVA in Paris, France.

board_of_directors.name: Ian Bruce
board_of_directors.background: Ian Bruce is the Chair of the Board. He is the former President and CEO of Peters & Co. Limited, an investment firm. He has extensive experience in investment banking and the oil and gas industry.

sources.source_description: Annual Information Form for the year ended December 31, 2023
